body.title: book_learner: write per-book readable report named after READING_ memory ID
body.result: REOPENED — ticket was incorrectly closed. Original issue was only "Igor can't answer did I finish X?" but the real bug is completion records not written for Calibre books at all. Nodes deposit mid-run but READING_ node + reading_list status never written. File-based readable report also missing.
body.description: After each book run, book_learner writes ~/.TheIgors/book_learner_progress/READING_<hash>.md with human-readable summary: title, author, status, chunks processed, nodes deposited, per-chunk summaries (from extraction summary field). File name must match the Postgres READING_<hash> node ID so human can correlate run to memory. Currently only raw JSON progress + mixed log exist.
